# Perlette Cakes

Perlette Cakes is a home-based baker in Klang Valley, Malaysia.

- Products: custom celebration cakes, cupcakes, pastries, and cookies
- Delivery: across Klang Valley via Lalamove
- Pickup: not offered
- Lead time: usually 3 to 5 days, with more notice needed for larger or more detailed orders
- Ordering: customers order by WhatsApp
- WhatsApp: +60 19-650 5050
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/perlettecakes
- Website: https://perlettecakes.com/

Primary page:

- https://perlettecakes.com/
